sqlMap.insert: insert into i_information_assign_t( informationid,assigntitle,assigncontent,signdepartment,signdepartids,instructions, judgeopinion,requirements,issuer,category,urgentflag,signlimit,feedbacklimit, attachments,validflag,addoperator,departmentid,contactnumber,addtime,memo,slimit,flimit )values( $informationid$,'$assigntitle$','$assigncontent$','$signdepartment$','$signdepartids$','$instructions$', '$judgeopinion$','$requirements$','$issuer$','$category$','$urgentflag$','$signlimit$','$feedbacklimit$', '$attachments$',1,'$addoperator$','$departmentid$','$contactnumber$','$addtime$','$memo$','$slimit$','$flimit$' ) select last_insert_id() as id
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from i_information_assign_t where validflag > 0
departmentid = $departmentid$
informationid = $informationid$
(assigntitle like '%$assigntitle$%')
urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'

select a.*,b.departname as departmentname from i_information_assign_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.departmentid = b.id where a.validflag > 0
a.departmentid = $departmentid$
a.informationid = $informationid$
(a.assigntitle like '%$assigntitle$%')
a.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
order by id desc
select a.*,b.departname as departmentname from i_information_assign_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.departmentid = b.id where a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: update i_information_assign_t set validflag = 0 where id = $id$
